Proven Impact

Read how we've transformed leading enterprises with Data and AI solutions, delivering measurable ROI in months, not years.

Global Logistics Provider

Optimizing Routes with Real-time IoT Data Streaming

We built an Apache Kafka pipeline to ingest 10GB/s of telemetry data, reducing fuel consumption by 14% across a fleet of 5,000 vehicles.

Tier 1 Investment Bank

Predictive Risk Analytics for Institutional Portfolios

Deployed a machine learning risk engine on AWS that analyzes market sentiment and structured transaction data in sub-second latency.

National Health Network

Unifying Siloed EMR Data into a Searchable Gen-AI Lake

Implemented an enterprise RAG architecture allowing clinicians to query decades of unstructured patient records securely and instantly.

SaaS Unicorn

Zero-Downtime Migration of a Monolith to Kubernetes

Refactored a legacy application into scalable microservices orchestrated via Kubernetes on GCP, reducing infrastructural costs by 35%.
